name: Freshdesk (uvx)
description: Interact with Freshdesk customer support. Manage tickets, conversations, contacts, companies, agents, and ticket fields through the Freshdesk API.

inputs.label: Freshdesk API Key
inputs.description: Your Freshdesk API key, used to authenticate requests to the Freshdesk API.

obtain.instructions:
1. Log in to your Freshdesk account
2. Click your profile picture (top right) and open Profile Settings
3. Find Your API Key in the right-hand sidebar
4. Copy the API key

inputs.label: Freshdesk Domain
inputs.description: Your Freshdesk instance domain, e.g. yourcompany.freshdesk.com.

auth.instructions: Generate your Freshdesk API key from your Freshdesk Profile Settings (look for 'Your API Key' in the right sidebar) and provide your Freshdesk domain (e.g. yourcompany.freshdesk.com).
